context: Tests whether the agent implements the attribution model engine with the correct set of models, the specified time-decay half-life, the position-based weight distribution, and ensures weights always sum to 1.0. Also checks that position-based is the default model and edge cases (n=1, n=2) are handled correctly.

checklist.name: All five models present
checklist.description: Implementation supports all five model types: last-touch, first-touch, linear, time-decay, and position-based (code contains all five identifiers/cases)

checklist.name: Time-decay half-life value
checklist.description: Time-decay model uses a half-life of exactly 7 days (code contains 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 or equivalent 604800000 milliseconds)

checklist.name: Time-decay formula
checklist.description: Time-decay weights are computed using Math.pow(0.5, ageMs / halfLifeMs) or an equivalent exponential decay formula with base 0.5

checklist.name: Position-based 40/40/20 split
checklist.description: Position-based model assigns 0.4 to the first touchpoint, 0.4 to the last touchpoint, and splits the remaining 0.2 equally among middle touchpoints

checklist.name: Position-based n=1 edge case
checklist.description: Position-based model returns [1] when there is only a single touchpoint

checklist.name: Position-based n=2 edge case
checklist.description: Position-based model returns [0.5, 0.5] when there are exactly two touchpoints

checklist.name: Default model is position-based
checklist.description: The default attribution model value, wherever a default is set (function parameter default, useState default, or exported constant), is 'position-based' — NOT 'linear' or 'last-touch'

checklist.name: Weights sum to 1.0
checklist.description: demo-output.txt contains evidence (console output or assertion) that weights sum to 1.0 (within floating-point tolerance) for all model/order combinations tested

checklist.name: AttributedConversion structure
checklist.description: attributeConversion output includes creditFraction and creditAmount per touchpoint (both fields present in returned credits array)

checklist.name: Zero-touchpoint guard
checklist.description: attributeConversion handles the case of zero touchpoints (returns an empty credits array rather than throwing)

checklist.name: Demo output file exists
checklist.description: A file named demo-output.txt is present and contains weight/credit output for multiple model combinations

checklist.name: Linear model correctness
checklist.description: Linear model assigns equal weight 1/n to every touchpoint (code contains 1 / n or equivalent)
